holdings.infoBox: LGLV is an equity ETF with a total of 173 individual holdings. The top holdings are Welltower stock at 4.16%, Realty Income at 1.85%, Duke Energy at 1.42%, Public Service Enterprise Group at 1.24%, and The Southern Company at 1.23%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR US Large Cap Low Volatility Index ETF (LGLV) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the SSGA US Large Cap Low Volatility index. The fund tracks an index of the least volatile large-cap US stocks. LGLV was launched on Feb 20, 2013 and is issued by State Street.
infoTable: SSGA US Large Cap Low Volatility
